channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Android Auto has stopped working for many users — and the Samsung Galaxy S26 is among the phones affected
item.description: There are widespread reports of Pixel and Galaxy handsets no longer working properly with Android Auto.

item.title: ‘No discernible sacrifice’: The iPhone Air offers market-leading performance in one key way, new report says
item.description: The iPhone Air’s C1X modem is one of the fastest on the market, a new report claims.

item.title: Apple launched a ton of products this month — here's all the new additions, and how much they cost
item.description: Now the dust has settled on Apple's launch extravaganza, here's a run-down of what the new lineup looks like.

item.title: ‘For All Mankind’ Season 5 Beautifully Sets the Series Up for the Future
item.description: Joel Kinnaman and a new cast of characters lead the alternate reality space drama, which returns on March 27.

item.title: Tell us about your gaming habits and you could win a $300 / £250 Amazon voucher
item.description: Take our annual Gaming survey for a chance to win some spending money

item.title: The MacBook Neo is experiencing iPhone-like shortages — as Tim Cook hails ‘best launch week ever’ for new Mac buyers
item.description: Shipping for the MacBook Neo has been pushed to mid-April, so it's best to act now if you don't want to wait longer to snag one.

item.title: J’ai essayé la Renault Twingo E-Tech : la voiture électrique la moins chère de France est peut-être la plus cool
item.description: J’ai essayé la Renault Twingo E-Tech, la voiture électrique la moins chère du marché. Son prix d’attaque sous les 20 000 euros hors bonus est-il source de compromis ? Que vaut-elle face aux Dacia Spring et BYD Dolphin Surf ? Reste-t-elle une « vraie » Twingo ? Voici ce que j’ai pensé de cette nouvelle citadine électrique abordable.

item.title: 'Perfect Record Store Day prep': Majority's new turntable-speaker combo is surprisingly affordable (and colorful!)
item.description: The new Majority Auto turntable and D50X bookshelf speakers are affordable, colorful, and out now (just in time for Record Store Day).

item.title: Tremblement de terre : TCL met la main sur les téléviseurs Sony
item.description: Sony est une place forte sur le marché du téléviseur, et le groupe japonais le restera dans les années à venir… mais probablement un peu moins. Le constructeur est en effet formellement entré en discussion avec TCL pour créer une coentreprise chargée de reprendre son activité de divertissement domestique — y compris les téléviseurs Bravia.

item.title: I Worked a Shift in a Fictional Video Store and It Was… a Lot of Fun?
item.description: God knows how Quentin Tarantino got any of those scripts written.

item.title: IKEA just launched a huge sale, and there's up to 71% off gorgeous lights for your home
item.description: I'm TechRadar's Homes Editor and I've scoured the sales to bring you this definitive list of the 12 best lighting deals.

item.title: 'This is not just another ergonomic office chair': Comfortable for all-day working, Branch's Ergonomic Chair Pro gets a Spring Sale price cut
item.description: Branch's office chairs get a comfy Spring Sale price cut.

item.title: The Secretlab Magnus Pro is 'stable, highly modular, beautiful, and made with quality materials' — our top standing desk for gamers gets a Spring Sale price cut
item.description: Secretlab Magnus Pro, one of the top standing desks we've ever tested, gets a Spring Sale price cut.

item.title: Crimson Desert's new major patch addresses the biggest problem I had with the game — while Pearl Abyss promises Intel GPU support
item.description: Pearl Abyss has shown impressive dedication to implementing bug fixes and necessary changes to Crimson Desert, and now Intel Arc GPU support.

item.title: La Xiaomi Pad 8 est encore plus recommandable quand elle s’accompagne d’un clavier, d’une souris et d’un stylet offerts, parfaits pour les travailleurs nomades
item.description: La Xiaomi Pad 8 est une récente tablette tactile endurante, légère et bien fluide. Mais avec un clavier, une souris et un stylet, elle se transforme en véritable machine de travail. Et justement, vous pouvez trouver tous ces produits dans un pack proposé à 499,99 euros au lieu de 549,99 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: I was wrong about the MacBook Neo and I’m glad about it — Apple’s new MacBook is ‘the best budget laptop you can buy right now’
item.description: I didn't believe Apple's MacBook Neo could be a great laptop, but it turns out I was wrong.

item.title: What is the release date for Last One Laughing UK season 2 episodes 4-5 on Prime Video?
item.description: Oh, big flash bang wallop, what a picture! TV's funniest show is in full swing, but what time is Last One Laughing UK season 2 episodes 4-5 on Prime Video?

item.title: Govee’s Outdoor Chromatic String Lights Sound Obnoxious in the Best Way
item.description: These smart light bulbs support Matter, but there's a catch.

item.title: Test du Motorola Signature : on a trouvé la recette du smartphone ultra-fin idéal
item.description: Finesse, raffinement et équipement aussi complet que performant sont les ingrédients utilisés par Motorola pour faire de son smartphone Signature un modèle du genre.

item.title: ‘Project Hail Mary’ Rocks Out to Big Worldwide Opening
item.description: Strong word of mouth and marketing helped 'Project Hail Mary' overperform at the box office and set some records.

item.title: Every bulb on Govee’s new outdoor string lights can display multicolor effects
item.description: Govee has announced a new set of outdoor string lights that allows for more color customization than competitors' products, as well as the company's existing color-changing set. Similar to its Outdoor UpDown Wall Light introduced in July 2025, Govee's new Outdoor Chromatic String Lights don't limit you to just one color per bulb. You can […]

item.title: What is the release date for Daredevil: Born Again season 2 episode 1 on Disney+?
item.description: Daredevil: Born Again returns for its second season this week — here's when it'll premiere on Disney+.

item.title: Global Europol crackdown knocks over 373,000 dark web sites offline
item.description: A network of fake child porn sites was taken down, and operators and users identified.

item.title: This single ChatGPT prompt can do hours of market research in minutes—here’s how
item.description: AI is a powerful way to do market research. A big update from ChatGPT makes things even easier. Market research can be a slow, fragmented, and difficult process, often involving tedious internet searches, questionable data sources, and time-consuming manual synthesis. This makes it a great candidate for some assistance from AI. What’s more, an update to a popular feature on ChatGPT has made it even better at doing this kind of work. ...

item.title: Gold and silver prices down today: 2 factors sending safe haven assets plummeting amid Iran war
item.description: Here’s what traders in precious metals need to know this morning. It’s another bad day for gold and silver. Traders in precious metals are seeing both gold and silver plummet significantly as the week kicks off, with gold down nearly 7% and silver down 8% over the past 24 hours.

item.title: Why CISOs must link cyber to an organization's profit and loss
item.description: CISOs have put cyber on the boardroom agenda. Now it’s time to move the conversation forward.

item.title: Over half of UK businesses have no idea how fast they could stop AI in a crisis
item.description: UK businesses are really underperforming on AI accountability, which shows the EU AI Act isn't having its desired impacts.

item.title: Modern Warfare is currently the most played Call of Duty game on Steam thanks to an incredible price cut
item.description: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare has plummeted down to a lowest-ever price and player counts have shot up as a result.

item.title: Alain Brillet, l'un des pères du détecteur d'ondes gravitationnelles européen Virgo, est décédé
item.description: Il a contribué à ouvrir une nouvelle fenêtre en astronomie, celle rendue possible par les ondes gravitationnelles d'Einstein, ces déformations ondulatoires du tissu de l'espace-temps courbe de la relativité générale. Le physicien français Alain Brillet est hélas décédé. Ses contributions...

item.title: Best Laptops (2026): My Honest Advice Having Tested Hundreds
item.description: I've been reviewing laptops for over a decade, and this is my sincere advice on how to find the right laptop for you

item.title: Premiers tests du Dell XPS 16 : l’endurance de la puce Panther Lake continue d’émerveiller
item.description: Dévoilé au CES 2026, le nouvel XPS 16 commence à arriver chez les premiers testeurs et impressionne déjà par son endurance. Une autonomie XXL que l'appareil doit en bonne partie à l'impressionnante sobriété de sa puce Intel Panther Lake.

item.title: Lenovo Legion Go S : cette excellente console portable PC revient à un super prix
item.description: La Lenovo Legion Go S est une machine qui connait bien les promotions, et aujourd'hui elle revient au super prix de 449,99 euros, sachant qu'elle en valait 629,99 eurosà sa sortie.

item.title: Les meilleurs VPN pour le télétravail : notre comparatif des fournisseurs VPN pour travailler à distance
item.description: Le télétravail est un des cas de figure où l'usage du VPN est hautement recommandé. Mais pourquoi ? Lequel choisir ? Sur quels critères s'appuyer ? Voici notre comparatif des meilleurs VPN pour le télétravail pour faire son choix.

item.title: Mitigating the risks of autonomous AI with agent-ready data
item.description: Most AI failures aren’t caused by poor models, but by missing context.
